# Archimedes asset universe

What Archimedes prices and trades on-chain. This page is **generated from the single source of truth** (`backend/archimedes/data/synthetic_universe.json`) so it can never drift from the actual universe ‚Äî a CI test fails if it's stale. Regenerate with `python -m archimedes.scripts.gen_asset_universe_doc`.

- **On-chain deploy-eligible synths:** 59
- **Chainlink-covered:** 32 of 59
- **Single-name equity synths held back (backtest-only, compliance):** 59

**Parity invariant:** every on-chain synth is also backtestable (`on-chain ‚äÜ GLOBAL_ASSETS`), and every backtestable-but-not-on-chain symbol is an explained compliance-flagged single stock. Enforced by `backend/tests/test_universe_parity.py`.
